expectations.text: Test file has a describe() block
expectations.evidence: describe('Phases 8-10: Word Completion and Progress Saving', () => {

expectations.text: Tests clicking individual letters to spell a word
expectations.evidence: spellWord() helper splits word into letters and clicks each: cy.contains('button', letter).click(); Used to spell OI, UI, OU, EI, AU, EU, AI, UAU, UAI.

expectations.text: Asserts that the progress API was called (cy.wait or intercept check)

expectations.evidence: interceptProgressApi() helper calls cy.intercept('PUT', `${API_BASE}/students/${mockStudent.id}/progress`, {...}).as(alias); used in each phase's beforeEach.

expectations.text: Tests are specifically about phases 8-10 (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Separate describe blocks for 'Phase 8 - Two-letter word completion (OI, UI, OU)', 'Phase 9 - Two-letter word completion (EI, AU, EU)', and 'Phase 10 - Multi-letter word completion (AI, UAU, UAI)' with phase-specific student data.
